# tree-sitter-language-pack

> Universal code parser for 306 programming languages with code intelligence, syntax-aware chunking, and polyglot bindings.

## About

Tree-sitter-language-pack provides pre-compiled tree-sitter grammars for 306 programming languages with a unified API for parsing, structure extraction, import/export detection, and intelligent code chunking for LLMs. Built in Rust with thin bindings for every major platform.

Parsers are downloaded on demand and cached locally — the initial package is small (~3MB) and parsers (~50KB each) are fetched automatically on first use.

## Organization

Part of the kreuzberg.dev ecosystem (documentation sites):
- **Kreuzberg** — Document intelligence: https://docs.kreuzberg.dev/ — repo: https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/Kreuzberg
- **html-to-markdown** — HTML to Markdown: https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/ — repo: https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/html-to-markdown
- **liter-llm** — Universal LLM API client: https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/ — repo: https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/liter-llm
- **tree-sitter-language-pack** — Universal code parser (this repo): https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev — https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/tree-sitter-language-pack

## Key APIs

- `init(config)` — Configure and pre-download parsers
- `download(languages)` — Download specific parser libraries
- `get_language(name)` — Get a tree-sitter Language (auto-downloads if needed)
- `process(source, config)` — Extract code intelligence (structure, imports, exports, comments, symbols, chunks)
- `parse_string(language, source)` — Parse source code into a syntax tree
- `available_languages()` — List locally available languages
- `manifest_languages()` — List all 306 available from remote manifest
- `ProcessConfig` — Configure which analysis features to enable and chunking parameters
- `PackConfig` — Configure cache directory and languages to pre-download

## CLI

The `ts-pack` CLI bundles all 306 parsers into a single static binary:
- `ts-pack download [languages]` — Download parser libraries
- `ts-pack parse <file> --language <lang>` — Parse source code
- `ts-pack process <file> --all` — Run full code intelligence pipeline
- `ts-pack list --manifest` — List all available languages

Install: `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kreuzberg-dev/tree-sitter-language-pack/main/install.sh | bash`

## Supported Languages

306 languages including: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Rust, Go, Java, C, C++, C#, Ruby, PHP, Swift, Kotlin, Scala, Haskell, Elixir, Erlang, Lua, R, Julia, Dart, Zig, Nim, and 226+ more.

## Minimum Versions

- Python: 3.10+
- Node.js: 18+
- Rust: 1.85+
- Go: 1.26+
- Java: 25+
- Ruby: 3.2+
- Elixir: 1.14+ / OTP 25+
- PHP: 8.2+
